ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin/Agenda safe-mode reboot pivot for EDR-blind encryption (bcdedit safeboot + forced restart)
ucs.description: Qilin (a.k.a. Agenda) is one of the few RaaS crews that consistently reboots victim hosts into Safe Mode with Networking before detonating its Rust/Go encryptor — Safe Mode strips most EDR/AV agents, defeating runtime protections. The detection chains a rare bcdedit `safeboot` write to a forced restart and/or Defender service tampering on the same host inside a short window, which is highly characteristic of Qilin/Agenda affiliates and not of generic ransomware.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND Processes.process="*safeboot*" AND (Processes.process="*network*" OR Processes.process="*minimal*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("shutdown.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Restart-Computer*" OR Processes.process="* /r *" OR Processes.process="* /r/f*" OR Processes.process="* -r *")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("sc.exe","net.exe","powershell.exe") AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND (Processes.process="*WinDefend*" OR Processes.process="*SecurityHealthService*" OR Processes.process="*Sense*" OR Processes.process="*MsMpSvc*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process _time span=10m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval bcdedit_safeboot=if(process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND match(process,"(?i)safeboot"),1,0), force_reboot=if(match(process,"(?i)(Restart-Computer|shutdown\.exe.*-?\/?r)"),1,0), defender_kill=if(match(process,"(?i)(WinDefend|SecurityHealthService|Sense|MsMpSvc)") AND match(process,"(?i)stop"),1,0) | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime sum(bcdedit_safeboot) as bcdedit_hits sum(force_reboot) as reboot_hits sum(defender_kill) as defender_hits values(user) as users values(process) as cmds values(parent_process_name) as parents by dest | where bcdedit_hits>=1 AND (reboot_hits>=1 OR defender_hits>=1) | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let WindowMin = 15m;
let SafebootEvents = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "safeboot"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("network", "minimal", "/set")
    | project SafebootTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SafebootCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              SafebootParent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              SafebootParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
let ContextEvents = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName in~ ("shutdown.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\s[-/]r(\s|$)")
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Restart-Computer","shutdown /r","shutdown -r"))
         or (FileName in~ ("sc.exe","net.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has "stop"
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("WinDefend","SecurityHealthService","Sense","MsMpSvc","WdNisSvc"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring","Stop-Service WinDefend","Stop-Service Sense"))
    | project CtxTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              CtxCmd = ProcessCommandLine, CtxBin = FileName;
SafebootEvents
| join kind=inner ContextEvents on DeviceId
| where CtxTime between (SafebootTime - WindowMin .. SafebootTime + WindowMin)
| summarize Reboots = countif(CtxCmd matches regex @"(?i)(Restart-Computer|shutdown.*-?/?r)"),
            DefenderKill = countif(CtxCmd has_any ("WinDefend","SecurityHealthService","Sense","MsMpSvc","DisableRealtimeMonitoring")),
            CtxSamples = make_set(CtxCmd, 10),
            FirstSafeboot = min(SafebootTime),
            LastSafeboot  = max(SafebootTime),
            SafebootCmd   = any(SafebootCmd),
            SafebootParent = any(SafebootParent),
            SafebootParentCmd = any(SafebootParentCmd)
            by DeviceName, AccountName
| where Reboots > 0 or DefenderKill > 0
| order by FirstSafeboot desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let WindowMin = 15m;
let SafebootEvents = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"
    | where CommandLine has "safeboot"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("network","minimal","/set")
    | project SafebootTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              SafebootCmd = CommandLine, SafebootParent = ParentProcessName;
let ContextEvents = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\shutdown.exe" and CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\s[-/]r(\s|$)")
         or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe")
            and CommandLine has_any ("Restart-Computer","shutdown /r","shutdown -r","Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring","Stop-Service WinDefend","Stop-Service Sense"))
         or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\sc.exe","\\net.exe")
            and CommandLine has "stop"
            and CommandLine has_any ("WinDefend","SecurityHealthService","Sense","MsMpSvc","WdNisSvc"))
    | project CtxTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, CtxCmd = CommandLine;
SafebootEvents
| join kind=inner ContextEvents on Computer
| where CtxTime between (SafebootTime - WindowMin .. SafebootTime + WindowMin)
| summarize Reboots = countif(CtxCmd matches regex @"(?i)(Restart-Computer|shutdown.*-?/?r)"),
            DefenderKill = countif(CtxCmd has_any ("WinDefend","SecurityHealthService","Sense","MsMpSvc","DisableRealtimeMonitoring")),
            CtxSamples = make_set(CtxCmd, 10),
            FirstSafeboot = min(SafebootTime),
            SafebootCmd = any(SafebootCmd),
            SafebootParent = any(SafebootParent)
            by Computer, Account
| where Reboots > 0 or DefenderKill > 0
| order by FirstSafeboot desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Qilin/Agenda Safe Mode Boot Configuration via bcdedit
id: 8c6a2d4e-7b1c-4a93-9f02-7c2a3e9d6b01
status: experimental
description: Detects bcdedit being used to enable safeboot, a TTP strongly associated with Qilin/Agenda ransomware affiliates who reboot into Safe Mode to bypass EDR before detonation.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/threat-actor-tracking/
  - https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/24/f/qilin-ransomware.html
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.t1562.009
  - attack.t1529
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    - Image|endswith: '\bcdedit.exe'
    - OriginalFileName: 'bcdedit.exe'
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'safeboot'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'network'
      - 'minimal'
  filter_legit:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\setup.exe'
      - '\msiexec.exe'
  condition: selection_img and selection_cli and not filter_legit
fields:
  - User
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
  - ParentCommandLine
falsepositives:
  - IT staff manually troubleshooting boot issues
  - Imaging / OSD task sequences
level: high
ucs.rationale: The bcdedit-safeboot → reboot → Defender-stop sequence is the published Qilin/Agenda detonation playbook (Microsoft Threat Intelligence, Trend Micro, Group-IB, Sophos X-Ops reporting on the Synnovis intrusion and earlier 2023-2024 healthcare campaigns). Other RaaS crews occasionally reboot, but Qilin's Rust binary explicitly checks for `--safe-mode` execution context, and affiliates standardise on

ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin/Agenda pre-encryption recovery sabotage burst (shadow copy + boot recovery + backup catalog wipe on one host)
ucs.description: Qilin's leaked builder and incident reports (Halcyon, Group-IB, BlackBerry) show affiliates fire a tightly clustered burst of recovery-killing commands seconds before the encryptor runs: vssadmin/wmic shadow delete, wbadmin catalog delete, and bcdedit recovery/bootstatuspolicy disable. Detecting ≥3 of these distinct sabotage primitives on the same host inside 5 minutes is a near-deterministic Qilin/Agenda (and adjacent Conti-lineage) impact-stage signal.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","wbadmin.exe","bcdedit.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","sc.exe","net.exe") AND (Processes.process="*delete shadows*" OR Processes.process="*shadowcopy delete*" OR Processes.process="*Win32_Shadowcopy*" OR Processes.process="*delete catalog*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*" OR Processes.process="*recoveryenabled no*" OR Processes.process="*resize shadowstorage*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name _time span=5m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval primitive=case(match(process,"(?i)delete\s+shadows"),"vssadmin_delete", match(process,"(?i)(Win32_Shadowcopy|shadowcopy\s+delete)"),"wmi_shadow_delete", match(process,"(?i)wbadmin.*delete\s+catalog"),"wbadmin_catalog", match(process,"(?i)bootstatuspolicy\s+ignoreallfailures"),"bcdedit_bootpolicy", match(process,"(?i)recoveryenabled\s+no"),"bcdedit_recovery", match(process,"(?i)resize\s+shadowstorage"),"vss_resize", true(),"other") | where primitive!="other" | bin _time span=5m | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime dc(primitive) as primitive_count values(primitive) as primitives values(cmds) as cmds values(parents) as parents values(user) as users by dest _time | where primitive_count>=3 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let WindowMin = 5m;
let MinPrimitives = 3;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("delete shadows","resize shadowstorage"))
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
     or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
     or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("catalog","backup","systemstatebackup"))
     or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures","recoveryenabled no","recoveryenabled No"))
| extend Primitive = case(
    ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)delete\s+shadows", "vssadmin_delete",
    ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)resize\s+shadowstorage", "vssadmin_resize",
    ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(Win32_Shadowcopy|shadowcopy\s+delete)", "wmi_shadow_delete",
    ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)wbadmin.*delete\s+(catalog|backup|systemstatebackup)", "wbadmin_delete",
    ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)bootstatuspolicy\s+ignoreallfailures", "bcdedit_bootpolicy",
    ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)recoveryenabled\s+no", "bcdedit_recovery",
    "other")
| where Primitive != "other"
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            DistinctPrimitives = dcount(Primitive),
            Primitives = make_set(Primitive),
            Commands   = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 20),
            Parents    = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, WindowMin)
| where DistinctPrimitives >= MinPrimitives
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let WindowMin = 5m;
let MinPrimitives = 3;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("delete shadows","resize shadowstorage"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
     or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has_any ("catalog","backup","systemstatebackup"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures","recoveryenabled no"))
| extend Primitive = case(
    CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)delete\s+shadows", "vssadmin_delete",
    CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)resize\s+shadowstorage", "vssadmin_resize",
    CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(Win32_Shadowcopy|shadowcopy\s+delete)", "wmi_shadow_delete",
    CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)wbadmin.*delete\s+(catalog|backup|systemstatebackup)", "wbadmin_delete",
    CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)bootstatuspolicy\s+ignoreallfailures", "bcdedit_bootpolicy",
    CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)recoveryenabled\s+no", "bcdedit_recovery",
    "other")
| where Primitive != "other"
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated),
            DistinctPrimitives = dcount(Primitive),
            Primitives = make_set(Primitive),
            Commands   = make_set(CommandLine, 20),
            Parents    = make_set(ParentProcessName, 10)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, WindowMin)
| where DistinctPrimitives >= MinPrimitives
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Qilin/Agenda's encryptor and pre-launch batch script (recovered samples 2023-2025, including the .NET wrapper observed in Synnovis) executes vssadmin, wmic, wbadmin and bcdedit in tight succession from a single elevated session. Generic ransomware detections fire on any single primitive — high noise. Requiring ≥3 distinct recovery-sabotage primitives on the same host inside 5 minutes pushes false
